oscillator_packet
uvm_sequence_item
oscillator_packet
sine_packet

Represents the current state of an oscillator; frequency, enabled status, and disabled state.

Variables
enabled
rand bit enabled

If 1, the clock is enabled with the given frequency. Else, the clock is disabled with the packet disabled state.

frequency_int
rand int frequency_int

Determines the frequency of an active clock. Just an integer workaround to a real variable set in post_randomize.

disabled_state
rand bit disabled_state

Determines the disabled state of an inactive clock
